Main worktree binary at /home/jared/agentguard-workspace/agent-guard/apps/cli/dist/bin.js works (v2.10.3). Scope: add binary validation probe in scripts/claude-hook-wrapper.sh after setting AGENTGUARD_BIN; if probe fails and we're in a worktree, fall back to git-worktree-list main path.

dogfoodObservations.description: FIRST-PARTY CONFIRMATION: This EM run (kernel-em-3647726) experienced the #1376 bug in production. `node apps/cli/dist/bin.js --version` crashes with ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND for @red-codes/storage. Startup build also failed (turbo cache miss for @red-codes/agentguard, 100+ TS2307 errors from missing workspace package type declarations). Result: ALL tool calls in this EM session were ungoverned. Main worktree binary at /home/jared/agentguard-workspace/agent-guard/apps/cli/dist/bin.js works (v2.10.3) — validated as the fallback target.
dogfoodObservations.proposedFix: In scripts/claude-hook-wrapper.sh after setting AGENTGUARD_BIN: add a `node $BIN --version &>/dev/null` probe. If probe fails, resolve main worktree via `git worktree list --porcelain | head -1 | sed 's/^worktree //'` and use that binary instead. Must be silent, no output change, no new log lines.

dogfoodObservations.description: No governance denials observed (governance was broken for this session, so this is expected). No other anomalies.
